overall.description: Cinematic gameplay footage from Ghost of Tsushima showing a samurai character exploring a rainy Japanese village during golden hour. The character walks through covered market stalls, crosses a wooden bridge over water, explores lakeside grasslands with distant black smoke visible, and approaches a fisherman on a wooden dock.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered market walkway with merchant stalls

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through a covered market area with thatch roofing, passing wooden stalls and barrels

entered.detail: thick thatch roofing covering the market walkway
wooden stall structure with various goods
stacked wooden barrels near the stall

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a covered market walkway with thick thatch roofing overhead. Wooden merchant stalls line the sides with barrels and shelves visible. The ground is a mix of dirt and grass, sheltered from the rain.

events.description: exits covered market into open area approaching the bridge
ascends wooden stairs onto the covered bridge

agents.ego_description: approaching and climbing onto a covered wooden bridge, passing villagers standing on the bridge looking at the water

notable_agents.action: two villagers standing on the bridge looking out at the lake with floating lanterns

entered.detail: wooden bridge with thatched roof and railings spanning the water
wooden handrails along the bridge sides
illuminated paper lantern hanging from the bridge roof
calm lake water with floating lanterns visible

segments.scene_description: The character exits the covered market and approaches a wooden bridge over a lake. After ascending the stairs onto the bridge, the character passes two villagers standing and looking at the water. The bridge has a thatched roof and hanging paper lanterns, with views of the lake and floating lanterns beyond.

scene_state.functional_zone: lakeside grassland with distant waterfall and smoke

events.description: descends from bridge to lakeside grass path
black smoke column becomes visible rising in the distance

agents.ego_description: walking through tall grass along the lakeshore, observing the distant smoke column and waterfall

entered.detail: dense tall grass covering the lakeside ground
traditional stone lantern along the path
thick black smoke rising from a distant fire
waterfall visible in the distant mountains
dense bamboo trees along the water's edge

segments.scene_description: The character descends from the bridge into tall grass along the lakeshore. Walking through the dense vegetation, a black smoke column becomes visible in the distance, suggesting a fire. The area features stone lanterns, bamboo groves, and views of a distant waterfall against the mountains.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden fishing dock on the lake

events.description: steps onto wooden dock from grass path
stops next to fisherman to observe the lake

agents.ego_description: walking along the wooden dock and stopping beside a fisherman who is sitting and fishing, looking out at the lake with floating lanterns

notable_agents.action: villager sitting on the dock fishing with a rod in the water

entered.detail: elevated wooden dock platform extending over the water
fishing nets and equipment hanging near the dock
paper lanterns floating on the water surface
small shelter with thatched roof on the dock

segments.scene_description: The character steps onto a wooden fishing dock from the grass path. Walking along the dock past fishing nets, the character approaches a villager sitting and fishing. The character stops beside the fisherman, looking out at the lake where floating lanterns drift on the water, illuminated by the golden hour sun breaking through the rain.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the sheltered confines of a village market into an expansive, rain-swept lakeside landscape during the golden hour. It begins by following the character through a covered walkway lined with merchant stalls and thatch roofing, before moving outward toward a wooden bridge. As the character ascends the bridge and passes villagers under hanging paper lanterns, the view opens up to a lake filled with floating lights. The scene then shifts as the character descends into tall lakeside grasses and bamboo groves, where a column of black smoke rises against a backdrop of distant mountains and a waterfall. Finally, the camera follows the character from the vegetation onto a wooden fishing dock, coming to a stop beside a fisherman as the sun breaks through the rain to illuminate the drifting lanterns on the water.
